label: od automation is a delayed headless mutation surface, so a later scheduled fire may have no agent turn to load sk-design
enforcement: enforceable for schedule/routine classification and token-required fixtures; advisory for final visual quality

label: Fire-time-only validation is too late for unattended scheduled design generation; the proof must be minted at schedule creation and replayed later
enforcement: enforceable for denying future fires when the frozen binding is absent, stale, or mismatched; advisory for semantic product appropriateness

label: Current sk-design proof cards and proof_check.py cannot represent routine id, schedule spec, planned mutating tools, or future-fire replay
enforcement: enforceable for adding required automation binding fields and parser checks; advisory for private model reasoning

label: Recurring schedules need explicit max-run/max-age review cadence rather than unlimited token replay
enforcement: enforceable for max-run, expiry, and remint-required checks; advisory for whether recurring design generation should be allowed

label: Any Open Design automation schedule that can later perform design-feeding mutations must freeze DESIGN_PROOF_TOKEN v1.automationBinding at creation time
Scheduled automation fires may only replay a frozen proof binding and must deny absent, expired, consumed, routine-mismatched, schedule-mismatched, subject-mismatched, or payload-mismatched tokens
Recurring design-generation automation must carry singleFire or bounded reviewWindow semantics, never an immortal proof token

direction: fire-time-only token minting for scheduled Open Design generation
reason: A future scheduled automation fire may have no agent prompt, loaded sk-design context, or user review turn, so minting proof only at fire time recreates the bypass instead of preventing it.

focus: [D4-A12/D4] headless automation time-bomb - od automation schedules/fires generation with no later agent turn; freeze proof token at schedule creation
